name: Spinach with Bechamel
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach briefly by either boiling or steaming. Drain and squeeze out excess moisture.
2. Mix with 1 cup white sauce and warm over low heat, 3-to-5 minutes.
3. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
4. Add the flour and cook, stirring with a wooden spoon, 2-to-3 minutes.
5. Remove from heat, add the hot milk gradually, stirring constantly with a whisk.
6. Return to the heat and simmer, stirring constantly, until thickened, 2-to-3 minutes.
